steps.title: Find the revealing verb phrase
steps.content: The passage says “certain drawbacks made themselves very manifest.” This phrase signals that the drawbacks have become perceptible or obvious as time passed.

steps.title: Match to the target meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is “clearly visible” or “apparent.” “Evident” precisely expresses this — something evident is clearly seen or understood, which matches how the drawbacks have become apparent to Katharine.

The other options describe different qualities and don't fit this meaning.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
